key_requirements: Add DocsCreated, DocsReviewed, DocsRevised states to StatePhase enum between ChangeImplementationReviewed and ChangeMergeCreated
Add DocsCheck routing logic: if no [sdd.docs] config or no crate match, skip to ChangeMergeCreated; otherwise advance to DocsCreated
Add docs phase to Phase Routing table in run-change section
CRR cycle for docs phase: DocsCreated → DocsReviewed → DocsRevised (same max revisions pattern)
Add [sdd.docs] config section to SddConfig schema with output_dir (default: 'docs') and targets array
DocsTarget fields: crate (string, required), guide (string, required path), audience (enum: developer/end-user/admin), sections (string array)
Add sdd-doc-writer agent definition to Agent Definitions table (tools: Read, Write, Glob, Grep, Bash; model: sonnet)
Add sdd-doc-reviewer agent definition (tools: Read, Glob, Grep, Bash; model: sonnet)
Presence of [sdd.docs] section = enabled (no explicit 'enabled' flag)
All four execution mode presets (multi_agents, multi_claude_agents, claude_subagents, mainthread) need docs phase action entries
Add OpenRPC definitions for sdd_workflow_create_change_docs, sdd_workflow_review_change_docs, sdd_workflow_revise_change_docs
sdd_workflow_create_change_docs: routes to doc-writer agent, returns prompt_path + executor
sdd_workflow_review_change_docs: routes to doc-reviewer agent; executes CLI commands to verify accuracy
DocsCheck decision is embedded in sdd_run_change routing — not a separate tool
Add create-change-docs, review-change-docs, revise-change-docs to the sdd workflow command tree
Add CLI → Logic Mapping rows for new docs workflow commands
CRR cycle pattern: Create → Review (APPROVED/REVIEWED) → Revise → re-review; max 1 revision per group, auto-approve on exceed
Artifact writing enforcement pattern: prompt constraint + verify_artifact_cli_called() + mainthread fallback
Agent retry mechanism with MAX_AGENT_RETRIES=2
Phase routing: group progress tracking via groups_progress in STATE.yaml
Docs phase occurs after ChangeImplementationReviewed (APPROVED) — same trigger point as merge in current implementation
Per-spec/per-target CRR sub-state pattern for inline reviews
Side effects pattern: phase transitions in STATE.yaml
Revision tracking pattern via task_revisions in STATE.yaml
Merge phase now comes after docs phase (ChangeMergeCreated only reached after DocsReviewed APPROVED or docs skipped)
Merge still includes doc output files (in output_dir) as part of the committed change
Archive structure unchanged — docs are in repo output_dir, not in archive
Execution loop handles new docs phase tools: sdd_workflow_create_change_docs etc.
sdd-doc-writer agent dispatched via subagent:* executor in claude_subagents mode
No structural loop changes needed — existing executor dispatch handles new tools
CRR cycle pattern reference — docs phase uses same Create-Review-Revise structure
Section type system — doc prompts may reference section types to guide what to document
Simple phase logic pattern without CRR — contrast with docs phase which does have CRR
Side effects table pattern for STATE.yaml changes
docs_platform is documented as a reserved future section in platform.md — [sdd.docs] config in agents.md is separate from this
Precedent for multi-section config structure under [sdd.*] namespace
